feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Andhra Pradesh : పంద్రాగస్టు వేడుకలు Vijayawada లోనే, చురుగ్గా ఏర్పాట్లు!! Oneindia Telugu

link.title: Andhra Pradesh : పంద్రాగస్టు వేడుకలు Vijayawada లోనే, చురుగ్గా ఏర్పాట్లు!! Oneindia Telugu

entry.content:
Contrary to the speculation that Andhra Pradesh government will conduct this year’s Independence Day celebrations on August 15 at Visakhapatnam, it has now been decided that the celebrations will be held at Indira Gandhi Municipal Stadium in Vijayawada with limited gathering strictly following the Covid-19 guidelines.
#Independenceday
#74thindependenceday
#Vijayawada
#Andhrapradesh
#Visakhapatnam
#Vizag
#Ysjagan
#Ysjaganmohanreddy
#Apgovt
#Gautamsawang
విజయవాడ: రాష్ట్ర ప్రభుత్వం అందరి అంచనాలను మరోసారి తలకిందులు చేసింది. స్వాతంత్య్ర దినోత్సవ వేడుకలు ఈ సారి పరిపాలనా రాజధానిగా రూపుదిద్దుకోనున్న విశాఖపట్నంలో నిర్వహిస్తారంటూ వచ్చిన వార్తలకు తెర దించింది. ఈ సారి కూడా విజయవాడలోనే నిర్వహించడానికి ఏర్పాట్లు చేస్తోంది. ఇందిరాగాంధీ మున్సిపల్ స్టేడియంలో ఏర్పాట్లను పూర్తి చేస్తోంది. రాష్ట్ర పోలీస్ డైరెక్టర్ జనరల్ గౌతమ్ సవాంగ్ గురువారం ఏర్పాట్లను పర్యవేక్షించారు. రిహార్సల్స్‌ను నిర్వహించారు.
entry.summary: Contrary to the speculation that Andhra Pradesh government will conduct this year’s Independence Day celebrations on August 15 at Visakhapatnam, it has now been decided that the celebrations will be held at Indira Gandhi Municipal Stadium in Vijayawada with limited gathering strictly following the Covid-19 guidelines. #Independenceday #74thindependenceday #Vijayawada #Andhrapradesh #Visakhapatnam #Vizag #Ysjagan #Ysjaganmohanreddy #Apgovt #Gautamsawang విజయవాడ: రాష్ట్ర ప్రభుత్వం అందరి అంచనాలను మరోసారి తలకిందులు చేసింది. స్వాతంత్య్ర దినోత్సవ వేడుకలు ఈ సారి పరిపాలనా రాజధానిగా రూపుదిద్దుకోనున్న విశాఖపట్నంలో నిర్వహిస్తారంటూ వచ్చిన వార్తలకు తెర దించింది. ఈ సారి కూడా విజయవాడలోనే నిర్వహించడానికి ఏర్పాట్లు చేస్తోంది. ఇందిరాగాంధీ మున్సిపల్ స్టేడియంలో ఏర్పాట్లను పూర్తి చేస్తోంది. రాష్ట్ర పోలీస్ డైరెక్టర్ జనరల్ గౌతమ్ సవాంగ్ గురువారం ఏర్పాట్లను పర్యవేక్షించారు. రిహార్సల్స్‌ను నిర్వహించారు.

entry.title: Omer sueños robados capítulo 141 miercoles 5 de agosto del 2020 completo en español latino

link.title: Omer sueños robados capítulo 141 miercoles 5 de agosto del 2020 completo en español latino

entry.content: Meryem es una joven que ha pasado los últimos cinco años criando a su hermano adoptivo Ömer, llegando a trabajar día y noche para que ambos tengan una vida decente. Solo era una adolescente cuando una persona le entregó a Ömer a su papá, quien al ser encarcelado vio frustrado su intento de vender al niño. Poco sabe ella que Ömer es el hijo secuestrado de un adinerado hombre, Levent Metehanoğlu, a quien conocerán inesperadamente.
entry.summary: Meryem es una joven que ha pasado los últimos cinco años criando a su hermano adoptivo Ömer, llegando a trabajar día y noche para que ambos tengan una vida decente. Solo era una adolescente cuando una persona le entregó a Ömer a su papá, quien al ser encarcelado vio frustrado su intento de vender al niño. Poco sabe ella que Ömer es el hijo secuestrado de un adinerado hombre, Levent Metehanoğlu, a quien conocerán inesperadamente.

entry.title: These Teachers Bartered Plants For Their Students’ School Supplies

link.title: These Teachers Bartered Plants For Their Students’ School Supplies

entry.content: Instead of just soliciting goods and items, these teachers came up with a unique initiative to help their students get learning modules, school supplies, and health kits!
entry.summary: Instead of just soliciting goods and items, these teachers came up with a unique initiative to help their students get learning modules, school supplies, and health kits!

entry.title: HMS Victory ‘Afloat’ again for the first time in nearly 100 years

link.title: HMS Victory ‘Afloat’ again for the first time in nearly 100 years

entry.content:
In a unique collaboration between the National Museum of the Royal Navy (NMRN) and BAE
Systems, HMS Victory, the 255 year old flag ship of Vice-Admiral Nelson at the Battle of Trafalgar has
reached a major milestone in a multi-million pound conservation project that has continued despite
the UK’s nationwide lockdown.
entry.summary: In a unique collaboration between the National Museum of the Royal Navy (NMRN) and BAE Systems, HMS Victory, the 255 year old flag ship of Vice-Admiral Nelson at the Battle of Trafalgar has reached a major milestone in a multi-million pound conservation project that has continued despite the UK’s nationwide lockdown.

entry.title: மீண்டும் TikTok Ambani’s Reliance உதவியை நாடும் Byte Dance Oneindia Tamil

link.title: மீண்டும் TikTok Ambani’s Reliance உதவியை நாடும் Byte Dance Oneindia Tamil

entry.content:
#IndiaChinaFight
#TikTok
#Ambani
இந்தியாவில் டிக்டாக் செயலியை மீண்டும் கொண்டு வருவதற்கு வசதியாக, பைட் டான்ஸ் நிறுவனம் ரிலையன்ஸ் இண்டஸ்டிரீஸ் நிறுவனத்துடன் ஆலோசனை செய்து வருகிறது.
TikTok ByteDance in Talks with Ambani’s Reliance to sale its shares in India		 Investment in TikTok by India’s biggest oil-to-retail conglomerate could not only save its fate in one of its biggest online markets but also provide Mukesh Ambani-led RIL deeper connections with its customers
entry.summary: #IndiaChinaFight #TikTok #Ambani இந்தியாவில் டிக்டாக் செயலியை மீண்டும் கொண்டு வருவதற்கு வசதியாக, பைட் டான்ஸ் நிறுவனம் ரிலையன்ஸ் இண்டஸ்டிரீஸ் நிறுவனத்துடன் ஆலோசனை செய்து வருகிறது. TikTok ByteDance in Talks with Ambani’s Reliance to sale its shares in India Investment in TikTok by India’s biggest oil-to-retail conglomerate could not only save its fate in one of its biggest online markets but also provide Mukesh Ambani-led RIL deeper connections with its customers

entry.title: Madonna set to sign ‘eight-figure deal’ to resign to Warner Records

link.title: Madonna set to sign ‘eight-figure deal’ to resign to Warner Records

entry.content: Madonna is reportedly set to return to Warner Records after her three-album contract with Interscope came to an end.
entry.summary: Madonna is reportedly set to return to Warner Records after her three-album contract with Interscope came to an end.

entry.title: 10 Ağustos Türkiye gündemi

link.title: 10 Ağustos Türkiye gündemi

entry.content:
Rusya’dan Antalya, Bodrum ve Dalaman uçuşları başlıyor
Rusya’dan Antalya, Dalaman ve Bodrum’a tarifeli ve charter uçuşlar bugünden itibaren başlıyor.
Şehit polis Adem Keskin Samsun’da son yolculuğuna uğurlandı
Samsun’da uygulama noktasında dur ihtarına uymayan sürücüyü takip eden ve geçirdiği kazada hayatını kaybeden 33 yaşındaki polis memuru Adem Keskin, toprağa verildi.
Bakan Akar: Pençe Operasyonlarında 83 terörist etkisiz hale getirildi
Milli Savunma Bakanı Hulusi Akar, Pençe Operasyonları kapsamında bugüne kadar 83 teröristin etkisiz hale getirildiğini bildirdi.
Bulgaristan’daki yangının Türkiye’ye sıçramaması için önlemler artırılıyor
Bulgaristan’da kontrol altına alınamayan yangının Türkiye’ye sıçramaması için önlemler artırılıyor.
MSB: Zeytin Dalı bölgesinde 2 terörist gözaltına alındı
Zeytin Dalı bölgesinde terör faaliyetleri yürüttüğü tespit edilen 2 PKK/YPG’li terörist gözaltına alındı.
entry.summary: Rusya’dan Antalya, Bodrum ve Dalaman uçuşları başlıyor Rusya’dan Antalya, Dalaman ve Bodrum’a tarifeli ve charter uçuşlar bugünden itibaren başlıyor. Şehit polis Adem Keskin Samsun’da son yolculuğuna uğurlandı Samsun’da uygulama noktasında dur ihtarına uymayan sürücüyü takip eden ve geçirdiği kazada hayatını kaybeden 33 yaşındaki polis memuru Adem Keskin, toprağa verildi. Bakan Akar: Pençe Operasyonlarında 83 terörist etkisiz hale getirildi Milli Savunma Bakanı Hulusi Akar, Pençe Operasyonları kapsamında bugüne kadar 83 teröristin etkisiz hale getirildiğini bildirdi. Bulgaristan’daki yangının Türkiye’ye sıçramaması için önlemler artırılıyor Bulgaristan’da kontrol altına alınamayan yangının Türkiye’ye sıçramaması için önlemler artırılıyor. MSB: Zeytin Dalı bölgesinde 2 terörist gözaltına alındı Zeytin Dalı bölgesinde terör faaliyetleri yürüttüğü tespit edilen 2 PKK/YPG’li terörist gözaltına alındı.

entry.title: Le Niger rongé par une vaste criminalité

link.title: Le Niger rongé par une vaste criminalité

entry.content:
Le Niger doit faire face à de nombreux soucis en terme de sécurité. Entre la menace de certains groupes islamistes et les trafiquants en tout genre, le pays se retrouve gangrené par une criminalité toujours plus intense.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Le Niger doit faire face à de nombreux soucis en terme de sécurité. Entre la menace de certains groupes islamistes et les trafiquants en tout genre, le pays se retrouve gangrené par une criminalité toujours plus intense. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Le port du masque obligatoire à l’extérieur, dans les lieux fréquentés

link.title: Le port du masque obligatoire à l’extérieur, dans les lieux fréquentés

entry.content: Le port du masque obligatoire à l’extérieur, dans les lieux fréquentés : à partir de lundi à Paris ainsi qu’en Seine-Saint-Denis, dans les Hauts-de-Seine, le Val-de-Marne et le Val-d’Oise. Ces zones suivent l’exemple de Marseille, Ajaccio, Carcassonne, Bordeaux, Rennes ou Lille.View on euronews
entry.summary: Le port du masque obligatoire à l’extérieur, dans les lieux fréquentés : à partir de lundi à Paris ainsi qu’en Seine-Saint-Denis, dans les Hauts-de-Seine, le Val-de-Marne et le Val-d’Oise. Ces zones suivent l’exemple de Marseille, Ajaccio, Carcassonne, Bordeaux, Rennes ou Lille.View on euronews

entry.title: Ligue des champions - Dernier entraînement pour Griezmann et Lenglet avant Naples

link.title: Ligue des champions - Dernier entraînement pour Griezmann et Lenglet avant Naples

entry.content: Antoine Griezmann et Clément Lenglet se sont entraînés une dernière fois ce vendredi, à la veille de la réception de Naples. Les deux Français ont été retenus par Quique Setién pour ce 8e de finale retour de la Ligue des champions, contrairement à leurs compatriotes Ousmane Dembélé et Samuel Umtiti.
entry.summary: Antoine Griezmann et Clément Lenglet se sont entraînés une dernière fois ce vendredi, à la veille de la réception de Naples. Les deux Français ont été retenus par Quique Setién pour ce 8e de finale retour de la Ligue des champions, contrairement à leurs compatriotes Ousmane Dembélé et Samuel Umtiti.

entry.title: [ OFFICIAL ] Wentworth )( S08:E03 Season 8 Episode 3 ‘Full Episode’

link.title: [ OFFICIAL ] Wentworth )( S08:E03 Season 8 Episode 3 ‘Full Episode’

entry.content:
Wentworth Season 8 Episode 3 : Fallen Angel
One click & Happy Watching ►
================================
To WATCH FULL episodes of Wentworth Season 8 Episode 3 Online Series
Episode Overview:
Bea Smith is locked up while awaiting trial for the attempted murder of her husband and must learn how life works in prison. A modern adaptation and sequel of the iconic Prisoner series.
showcase		 Drama, Crime Kate Atkinson (Vera Bennett), Robbie Magasiva (Will Jackson), Kate Jenkinson (Allie Novak), Bernard Curry (Jake Stewart), Jacqueline Brennan (Linda Miles), Pamela Rabe (Joan Ferguson), Katrina Milosevic (Sue "Boomer" Jenkins), Leah Purcell (Rita Connors), Rarriwuy Hick (Ruby Mitchell), Susie Porter (Marie Winter), Kate Box (Lou Kelly), Jane Hall (Ann Reynolds), Zoe Terakes (Reb Keane), David de Lautour (Dr. Greg Miller)

A modern adaptation and sequel of the iconic Prisoner series. showcase Drama, Crime Kate Atkinson (Vera Bennett), Robbie Magasiva (Will Jackson), Kate Jenkinson (Allie Novak), Bernard Curry (Jake Stewart), Jacqueline Brennan (Linda Miles), Pamela Rabe (Joan Ferguson), Katrina Milosevic (Sue "Boomer" Jenkins), Leah Purcell (Rita Connors), Rarriwuy Hick (Ruby Mitchell), Susie Porter (Marie Winter), Kate Box (Lou Kelly), Jane Hall (Ann Reynolds), Zoe Terakes (Reb Keane), David de Lautour (Dr. Greg Miller)

entry.title: Pranab Mukherjee की हालत स्थिर, बेटे ने की दुआएं जारी रखने की गुजारिश वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Pranab Mukherjee की हालत स्थिर, बेटे ने की दुआएं जारी रखने की गुजारिश वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Former President Pranab Mukherjee’s condition stable, son requests to continue prayers. Former President Pranab Mukherjee has been admitted to the hospital after being found corona positive. At the same time, many types of rumors are flying on social media about his health.
कोरोना पॉजिटिव पाए जाने के बाद पूर्व राष्ट्रपति प्रणब मुखर्जी को अस्पताल में भर्ती कराया गया है. वहीं उनके स्वास्थ्य को लेकर सोशल मीडिया पर कई तरह की अफवाहें उड़ रही हैं.
#PranabMukherjee #Coronavirus #HealthUpdate
entry.summary: Former President Pranab Mukherjee’s condition stable, son requests to continue prayers. Former President Pranab Mukherjee has been admitted to the hospital after being found corona positive. At the same time, many types of rumors are flying on social media about his health. कोरोना पॉजिटिव पाए जाने के बाद पूर्व राष्ट्रपति प्रणब मुखर्जी को अस्पताल में भर्ती कराया गया है. वहीं उनके स्वास्थ्य को लेकर सोशल मीडिया पर कई तरह की अफवाहें उड़ रही हैं. #PranabMukherjee #Coronavirus #HealthUpdate

entry.title: Coronavirus: India’s recovery rate over 70%, over 60 thousand cases in 24 hours Oneindia News

link.title: Coronavirus: India’s recovery rate over 70%, over 60 thousand cases in 24 hours Oneindia News

entry.content:
As India continues to battle the Coronavirus Pandemic, India has logged 60,963 cases of coronavirus in the last 24 hours with 834 deaths, the Union Health Ministry said on Wednesday morning. The total number of cases in the country have now shot up to 23,29,638 with 46,091 deaths. A total of 16,39,599 COVID-19 patients have recovered from the infection, taking the recovery rate to 70.37 per cent.
#Covid-19
entry.summary: As India continues to battle the Coronavirus Pandemic, India has logged 60,963 cases of coronavirus in the last 24 hours with 834 deaths, the Union Health Ministry said on Wednesday morning. The total number of cases in the country have now shot up to 23,29,638 with 46,091 deaths. A total of 16,39,599 COVID-19 patients have recovered from the infection, taking the recovery rate to 70.37 per cent. #Covid-19

entry.title: Signs Of The Chickenpox

link.title: Signs Of The Chickenpox

entry.content:
Getting the chickenpox is a right of passage for all children.
The signs of chickenpox include fever, fatigue, headache, loss of appetite, and an itchy rash.
The rash usually develops about 10 to 21 days after you are exposed to the virus.
The other physical symptoms can occur a few days before the rash develops.
Business Insider reports that the infection usually lasts 5 to 10 days.
The virus goes away on its own, though certain high-risk groups will want to seek medication.
entry.summary: Getting the chickenpox is a right of passage for all children. The signs of chickenpox include fever, fatigue, headache, loss of appetite, and an itchy rash. The rash usually develops about 10 to 21 days after you are exposed to the virus. The other physical symptoms can occur a few days before the rash develops. Business Insider reports that the infection usually lasts 5 to 10 days. The virus goes away on its own, though certain high-risk groups will want to seek medication.

entry.title: Jérôme Salomon, directeur général de la Santé : ‘Les indicateurs sont mauvais, les signaux sont préoccupants et la situation se dégrade semaine après semaine, mais il n’y a pas de fatalité. Le sort de l’épidémie est entre nos mains.’

link.title: Jérôme Salomon, directeur général de la Santé : ‘Les indicateurs sont mauvais, les signaux sont préoccupants et la situation se dégrade semaine après semaine, mais il n’y a pas de fatalité. Le sort de l’épidémie est entre nos mains.’

entry.content:
Reprise de l’épidémie de Covid-19, situation des jeunes, protocoles sanitaires : le directeur général de la Santé, Jérôme Salomon, est l’invité du Grand entretien de France Inter.
Plus d’info:
entry.summary: Reprise de l’épidémie de Covid-19, situation des jeunes, protocoles sanitaires : le directeur général de la Santé, Jérôme Salomon, est l’invité du Grand entretien de France Inter. Plus d’info:

entry.title: Deewangi Episode 39

link.title: Deewangi Episode 39

entry.content:
Living with her cruel brother-in-law, ambitious Nageen Faiyaz works several menial jobs to break free from the shackles of poverty and dependence.
Working as a bus hostess, she meets Sultan Durrani; soon-to -be politician with great influence. Drawn by her presence, Sultan falls for Nageen, at first sight. Unaware of the intensity of what is to come next, he publicly expresses his emotions to Nageen. The following events change the course of their lives and career. With the support from her friends, Nageen attempts to start afresh.
Unable to resolve his difference with Nageen, Sultan sets on the mission to find her again. Will Nageen and Sultan’s second interaction be as tragic as the first? Or will the storm of feelings finally find peace?
entry.summary: Living with her cruel brother-in-law, ambitious Nageen Faiyaz works several menial jobs to break free from the shackles of poverty and dependence. Working as a bus hostess, she meets Sultan Durrani; soon-to -be politician with great influence. Drawn by her presence, Sultan falls for Nageen, at first sight. Unaware of the intensity of what is to come next, he publicly expresses his emotions to Nageen. The following events change the course of their lives and career. With the support from her friends, Nageen attempts to start afresh. Unable to resolve his difference with Nageen, Sultan sets on the mission to find her again. Will Nageen and Sultan’s second interaction be as tragic as the first? Or will the storm of feelings finally find peace?

entry.title: US Daily News - Belarus election Lukashenko’s claim of landslide victory sparks

link.title: US Daily News - Belarus election Lukashenko’s claim of landslide victory sparks

entry.content:
Clashes broke out in cities across Belarus on Sunday evening as riot police used rubber bullets, flash grenades, teargas and water cannon to quash protests against the results of the contested presidential election. Alexander Lukashenko, who has ruled for 26 years, claimed he had won a landslide victory in an election marred by accusations of vote-rigging. The election commission claimed Lukashenko was ahead with 82% of the vote in preliminary results on Sunday evening. The opposition, led by Svetlana Tikhanovskaya, had held some of the country’s largest political rallies since the days of the Soviet Union. Large protests broke out soon after the polls closed in Minsk, where a crowd of thousands gathered in the centre of the capital. A reporter for the Guardian saw police use water cannon against protesters and was fired on by rubber bullets. Opponents of Lukashenko chanted, “Leave!” Police made dozens of arrests. In one video, an army truck appeared to run into a protester. On Monday morning Reuters reported that at least one person was killed after being knocked over by a police prisoner van and dozens were injured. Fighting was also reported in approximately 20 other cities, including Gomel and Vitebsk. In several smaller cities, however, riot police were reported to have refused to engage protesters or retreated.“It’s certainly the biggest protest I’ve ever seen in Belarus since Lukashenko came to power,” said David Marples, a professor at the University of Alberta and an expert on Belarus. “In terms of the elections that Lukashenko’s held, there’s been nothing like it. It seems to me that the whole country really is in favour of change.”The decision to put down the protests violently has raised questions about the loyalty of interior ministry troops and whether Lukashenko’s own nerve could fail if he felt personally threatened by the protests.“We don’t really know how brave he is. He’s never been in a situation where he needs to be brave,” said Marples. The state news agency, Belta, said police were “in control of the situation at unsanctioned mass events”.
All data is taken from the source:
Article Link:
#Belarus #sandiegonews #middletownjournal #news #nytimes #cnn #newsnow
entry.summary: Clashes broke out in cities across Belarus on Sunday evening as riot police used rubber bullets, flash grenades, teargas and water cannon to quash protests against the results of the contested presidential election. Alexander Lukashenko, who has ruled for 26 years, claimed he had won a landslide victory in an election marred by accusations of vote-rigging. The election commission claimed Lukashenko was ahead with 82% of the vote in preliminary results on Sunday evening. The opposition, led by Svetlana Tikhanovskaya, had held some of the country’s largest political rallies since the days of the Soviet Union. Large protests broke out soon after the polls closed in Minsk, where a crowd of thousands gathered in the centre of the capital. A reporter for the Guardian saw police use water cannon against protesters and was fired on by rubber bullets. Opponents of Lukashenko chanted, “Leave!” Police made dozens of arrests. In one video, an army truck appeared to run into a protester. On Monday morning Reuters reported that at least one person was killed after being knocked over by a police prisoner van and dozens were injured. Fighting was also reported in approximately 20 other cities, including Gomel and Vitebsk. In several smaller cities, however, riot police were reported to have refused to engage protesters or retreated.“It’s certainly the biggest protest I’ve ever seen in Belarus since Lukashenko came to power,” said David Marples, a professor at the University of Alberta and an expert on Belarus. “In terms of the elections that Lukashenko’s held, there’s been nothing like it. It seems to me that the whole country really is in favour of change.”The decision to put down the protests violently has raised questions about the loyalty of interior ministry troops and whether Lukashenko’s own nerve could fail if he felt personally threatened by the protests.“We don’t really know how brave he is. He’s never been in a situation where he needs to be brave,” said Marples. The state news agency, Belta, said police were “in control of the situation at unsanctioned mass events”. All data is taken from the source: Article Link: #Belarus #sandiegonews #middletownjournal #news #nytimes #cnn #newsnow

entry.title: Dog’s Ears Perk up Whenever Owner Reaches for Their Plate

link.title: Dog’s Ears Perk up Whenever Owner Reaches for Their Plate

entry.content: This adorable dog stood by their owner while they sat on the dining table. Whenever the owner reached out to touch their empty plate kept on the table, the dog’s ears perked up instinctively.
entry.summary: This adorable dog stood by their owner while they sat on the dining table. Whenever the owner reached out to touch their empty plate kept on the table, the dog’s ears perked up instinctively.

entry.title: Beirut Blast: Aerial Footage Shows Scale of Destruction

link.title: Beirut Blast: Aerial Footage Shows Scale of Destruction

entry.content:
Aerial footage shows the devastating impact of a massive explosion that killed at least 100 people in Lebanon’s capital Beirut.
Officials said the huge blast, caused by 2,750 tonnes of ammonium nitrate, also injured more than 4,000.
It has emerged that the chemical was stored unsafely in a warehouse near the city’s port, where the explosion occurred.
Lebanese Prime Minister Hassan Diab has said that “those responsible will pay the price for this disaster.”
Authorities are still struggling to establish the full scale of the damage, as rescue efforts continue. Report by Avagninag. Like us on Facebook at and follow us on Twitter at
entry.summary: Aerial footage shows the devastating impact of a massive explosion that killed at least 100 people in Lebanon’s capital Beirut. Officials said the huge blast, caused by 2,750 tonnes of ammonium nitrate, also injured more than 4,000. It has emerged that the chemical was stored unsafely in a warehouse near the city’s port, where the explosion occurred. Lebanese Prime Minister Hassan Diab has said that “those responsible will pay the price for this disaster.” Authorities are still struggling to establish the full scale of the damage, as rescue efforts continue. Report by Avagninag. Like us on Facebook at and follow us on Twitter at

entry.title: Simon Cowell was almost left paralysed after breaking back in three places

link.title: Simon Cowell was almost left paralysed after breaking back in three places

entry.content: Simon Cowell was almost left paralysed after breaking his back in three places, during an accident at his Malibu home on Saturday (08.08.20).
entry.summary: Simon Cowell was almost left paralysed after breaking his back in three places, during an accident at his Malibu home on Saturday (08.08.20).

entry.title: On vous raconte l’histoire de Julia Roberts

link.title: On vous raconte l’histoire de Julia Roberts

entry.content:
Qu’elle joue une prostituée ou une mère courage, elle règne depuis 30 ans sur le cinéma hollywoodien. Elle a assuré son sourire pour 30 millions de dollars et fait de la simplicité sa marque de fabrique. C’est Julia Roberts.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Qu’elle joue une prostituée ou une mère courage, elle règne depuis 30 ans sur le cinéma hollywoodien. Elle a assuré son sourire pour 30 millions de dollars et fait de la simplicité sa marque de fabrique. C’est Julia Roberts. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Williamson defends exam grade system change

link.title: Williamson defends exam grade system change

entry.content: Education Secretary Gavin Williamson has defended the government’s late change to the school exam results system, saying, “I won’t apologise for the fact that we want to make these changes because we do believe they will benefit young people”. Report by Jonesia. Like us on Facebook at and follow us on Twitter at
entry.summary: Education Secretary Gavin Williamson has defended the government’s late change to the school exam results system, saying, “I won’t apologise for the fact that we want to make these changes because we do believe they will benefit young people”. Report by Jonesia. Like us on Facebook at and follow us on Twitter at
